description: High-performance image optimizer and converter (Free edition).
notes: libvips on PATH: (1) Official Pixify installer script — PowerShell: irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mahammed-Gaber/pixify/main/install-vips.ps1 | iex (layout under %USERPROFILE%\.pixify\vips per docs). (2) Or Scoop: scoop bucket add extras; scoop install vips — different install path than (1), but vips on PATH usually works. Guide: https://github.com/Mahammed-Gaber/pixify/blob/main/docs/install-libvips.md
